title: More Delight (for Farmer's Delight)
description: Extra meals, knives, and ingredients for Farmer's Delight that improve your culinary experience.
body:
[![BisectHosting Sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/znHQQtuU/images/72a3ec4b34bf89dbf4472f8e87d3c812d25f8159.png)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/gXBjH)
![More Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/znHQQtuU/images/653b6f24f05341edcd3cba3164edd0b8d2c0dd71.png)
**Embark on an expanded culinary journey** with More Delight, an add-on for the Farmer's Delight that adds even more meals, knives, and ingredients. [Check out the gallery to see more](https://modrinth.com/project/more-delight/gallery). ## 🍽️ Features - Expand your menu with new meals and ingredients. - Craft sandwiches effortlessly using bread slices. - Enjoy a crispy toast made from bread slices. - Equip yourself with wooden and stone knives for culinary precision.
## 🛠️ Works With - Expanded Delight - Casualness Delight - Supplementaries - Create - Some Assembly Required Many of these meals are inspired by the delicious things my girlfriend cooks. ![More Delight Images](https://i.imgur.com/kjz9llh.gif) ## ✨ Made with Delight Lib - Create add-ons for Farmer's Delight on multiple versions and loaders easily with just a few lines of code. [Get started here](https://github.com/axperty/delightlib/wiki). [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
[![Patreon Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Axperty) [![PayPal Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-singular_64h.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn) [![Ko-Fi Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/axperty)
